---
name: Suggest a Change
about: Something existing that could work differently in future
title: ''

---

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the change you are suggesting - the more detail you can provide about the existing behaviour versus the proposed behaviour the better.

## Supporting Materials
Provide any screenshots, diagrams, drawings or any other applicable materials that can help further demonstrate the proposed change.
